channel.title: GNfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mexican Street Corn Chicken Casserole
item.description: This casserole brings together classic elote flavors — lime, Tajin, sweet corn, and a creamy base — in a hearty baked dish.

item.title: New Orleans BBQ Shrimp
item.description: Tender shrimp cooked in a rich, buttery garlic sauce in the style of New Orleans barbecue — a regional classic worth trying.

item.title: Million Dollar Pasta Salad
item.description: A crowd-pleasing pasta salad loaded with crispy bacon, sharp cheese, and other bold ingredients that make it a go-to side dish.

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #86
item.description: This week's meal plan offers a fresh set of straightforward dinner ideas to simplify weeknight cooking.
